uplink.description: Status report, both probes dry (no leak)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds frame; expected.data derived by running reference/upstream-codec.js (Volt 30/10 = 3 V, both probes NoLeak) and mapping to vocabulary.
Synthetic in-bounds frame (mirrors the upstream status example: WaterLeak_1 NoLeak, WaterLeak_2 Leak). water.leak is the OR of both probes.

uplink.description: Status report, both probes leaking with low battery
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds frame; byte3 0x9E has the low-battery high bit set (0x1E = 30 -> 3 V). Reference decodes Volt '3(low battery)', both probes Leak.
Synthetic in-bounds config-report response; fPort 7 carries configuration, not a measurement.

uplink.description: Device info / startup frame (reportType 0x00, no measurement)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds startup frame; reportType 0x00 carries software/hardware version + datecode, not a measurement.
